title: alopecurus pratensis var. ruthenicus
intro: Alopecurus pratensis var. ruthenicus, also known as Ruthenic Meadow Foxtail, is a subspecies of the Alopecurus pratensis plant, a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Alopecurus pratensis var. ruthenicus include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health.
